publishedAbstract: In some instances, possibly during failed upgrades new/upgraded resources such as configmaps, serviceaccounts, etc. can fail to be implemented. This is especially true if the ocs-operator failed to provision during the upgrade. ~~~ 4m33s Warning FailedMount pod/rook-ceph-osd-2-5d5544f564-2cl6t MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "kube-api-access-th2qj": failed to fetch token: serviceaccounts "rook-ceph-osd" not found ~~~
publishedTitle: Missing Managed Resource (e.g. ServiceAccount, ConfigMap, etc.) “failed to fetch token: serviceaccounts "rook-ceph-osd"” - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
